title: Transcriptomics is essential but not sufficient to unravel complex plant-pathogen interactions.
author_string: Balotf, Sadegh, Wilson, Richard, Wilson, Calum
abstract: A group of genes that were upregulated in a resistant cultivar while downregulated in a susceptible cultivar in a transcriptomics analysis of potato challenged by Spongospora subterranea infection, did not show the same expression pattern at the protein level.
